author: Krea AI
description: Krea 2 RAW — the undistilled 12B base checkpoint (full-step, real cfg). Krea ships it for fine-tuning/LoRA training, but because it is NOT step-distilled it re-details cleanly at a LOW denoise — which makes it the right model for a faithful, blotch-free TILED upscale (the distilled Turbo can't: low denoise blotches, high denoise seams). Same Qwen3-VL encoder + Qwen Image VAE as Turbo.
license: Krea 2 Community License Agreement v.1 (open weights; commercial use requires an Enterprise License once total annual revenue reaches $1M)
notes: Undistilled base: full-step sampling with a REAL cfg. Render recipe (52 steps / cfg 3.5 / er_sde+simple) is DOCUMENTED — Krea's official CLI is `--checkpoint oss_raw --steps 52 --cfg 3.5`. Negatives use the real CFG branch but efficacy on the Qwen3-VL encoder is A/B-pending (may be inert like Qwen-Image). Shift is baked into the model (no ModelSamplingAuraFlow needed; mu~1.15 at 1024). Shares qwen3vl_4b + qwen_image_vae with Turbo. ~13 GB fp8 / ~26 GB bf16. Slow (no distillation) — for UPSCALE re-detail the JS engine uses fewer steps at low denoise, this 52-step recipe is for from-scratch t2i. RESOLUTION: RAW is DOCUMENTED 'up to 1024' — keep BOTH dims <=1024 (1024x1024 is its sweet spot; long edge >1024 like 1152/1216 melts faces — confirmed). Turbo is the 1k-2k model. For bigger output, render <=1024 then upscale (RAW tiles at 1024 = exactly its trained size, why the tiled upscale is so clean). SHIFT FIX (critical): ComfyUI hardcodes flow-shift mu=1.15 (Turbo's value) for the WHOLE krea2 class, but RAW needs RESOLUTION-DYNAMIC shifting (mu~0.906 @ 1024^2, smaller below) — the over-shift compresses the detail tail and melts faces. The raw t2i/i2i templates insert a ModelSamplingFlux node (base_shift 0.5, max_shift 0.90625, width/height = render size) which REPLACES the bad baked shift (verified against ComfyUI master: supported_models.py Krea2 shift=1.15, ModelType.FLUX). SHIP RECIPE (quality-research-tuned): 52 steps / cfg 5.0 / er_sde / beta — DOCUMENTED crispest-photoreal combo; euler/simple is doubly-soft (euler smooths micro-texture, simple under-weights the detail band). cfg 5.0 ~ Krea --cfg 3.5 in ComfyUI's (1+g) convention + diffusers' native 4.5. ModelSamplingFlux width/height MUST match render size or mu over-shifts on non-square buckets (1024^2->0.906, 896x1024->0.852, 832x1024->0.825, 768x1024->0.798). Turbo needs no shift node (its real mu IS 1.15). Without the ModelSamplingFlux node a RAW render melts.
